narrative:
Union South/West (precinct in Fayette County) has 1,056 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.3 percentage points.
